title: Collector canonical rows
description: The cross-platform output contract. schema_version is bumped on breaking changes; see MAINTAINING.md. Built by collector/schema.py.

account.description: namespace, not the platform account id

content_id.description: bvid / aweme_id. null for Douyin fan-growth (DOM has no id) — join by title+published_at.

published_at.description: ISO8601 where available; Douyin fan-growth rows are a minute-precision local 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM' string (DOM-sourced).

metrics.description: Only keys that apply are present (absent = N/A). Standard keys below; platforms may add extras (e.g. full_play_ratio).

fans.description: per-video fan delta. bilibili: cumulative attributed fans; douyin: 粉丝增量 within the publish-time window. Definitions differ — don't compare blindly across platforms.

fan_inc.description: net fan change that day (涨粉)
